name: UNITED STATES ANTIMONY CORP
sic_description: Primary Smelting & Refining of  Nonferrous Metals
summary: United States Antimony Corporation (UAMY) is engaged in mining, processing, and selling antimony and precious metals including gold and silver. The company operates properties in the United States and Mexico, producing antimony metal ingots and other antimony products. It holds a sole-source supply contract with the Defense Logistics Agency (DLA) for antimony metal ingots and sources antimony ore from domestic and international suppliers.
